strategy_engine.notes: Binance testnet demo profile. Sandboxed by default: execution_mode per strategy controls sandbox routing, so no live order is placed until Binance's gated sandbox write test has proven the venue. Credentials resolve from BINANCE_TESTNET_API_KEY / BINANCE_TESTNET_SECRET_KEY. Set HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true to enable live execution.

notes: Binance testnet only. New venue stays DISARMED until its gated write test passes.
